summary: VenuLoQ Premium UI Redesign Testing Complete - All 15 features verified on mobile viewport (390x844). Login page with luxury hero image, role selector with credential prefill, bottom-line inputs, Register page with Google auth, Search page with sharp rectangular filter chips, venue cards with 4:3 images and price/rating overlay, scroll-to-top on navigation, 'Start Planning' sticky CTA - all working correctly.

login_page_luxury_hero_image.details: Login page loads with luxury venue hero image (Unsplash URL in img[alt='Luxury venue'])

login_role_selector.details: Role selector (RM, Venue, Admin) present with data-testid='role-selector'

login_rm_role_prefill.details: Click RM role -> pre-fills email 'rm1@venuloq.in' and password 'rm123'

login_admin_role_hides_google.details: Click Admin role -> Google button hidden, shows 'Admin accounts use email and password only'

google_button_renders_correctly.details: Google Continue button renders with correct SVG icon (w-5 h-5 size)

admin_login_works.details: Login with admin@venuloq.in / admin123 -> redirects to /admin/dashboard

register_page_hero_image.details: Register page loads with hero image (img[alt='Luxury event'])

register_google_auth_button.details: Google auth button present with data-testid='google-register-btn'

register_bottom_line_inputs.details: All 5 inputs (name, email, phone, password, confirm) have bottom-line style (border-b class)

register_role_dropdown_works.details: Role selector dropdown opens showing 'Customer looking for venues', 'Venue Owner', 'Event Planner'

search_no_preselected_filters.details: Search page /venues/search loads with NO pre-selected filters - Wedding chip NOT active

search_venuloq_branding.details: VENU|LOQ text branding in header, NOT a round logo

venue_cards_4_3_aspect_ratio.details: Venue cards show images with aspect-[4/3] class

venue_cards_price_rating_overlay.details: 20 rating overlays (bottom-left) and 20 price overlays (bottom-right) found on venue card images

filter_chips_toggle_correctly.details: Wedding, Corporate, etc. chips toggle correctly (active state: bg-[#0B0B0D] text-white)

navigation_scroll_to_top.details: Navigate from search to venue detail scrolls to top (scroll position = 0)

sticky_cta_start_planning.details: Venue detail sticky CTA shows 'Start Planning' text (NOT 'Enquire Now')

design_verification.serif_headings: Cormorant Garamond font used in headings (e.g., 'Sign In', 'Explore Venues')
design_verification.bottom_line_inputs: border-0 border-b border-[#E5E0D8] style on form inputs
design_verification.sharp_rectangular_chips: Filter chips have NO rounded class - sharp rectangular style
design_verification.price_rating_on_image: Overlaid on images with absolute positioning and backdrop blur

context_for_next_testing_agent: VenuLoQ Premium UI Redesign verified. Key design elements: 1) Full-bleed hero images on Login/Register with gradient overlays, 2) Bottom-line inputs (border-bottom only), 3) Cream (#F4F1EC) background, 4) Sharp rectangular filter chips (no rounded corners), 5) Serif headings (Cormorant Garamond), 6) Venue cards with 4:3 aspect ratio images, price/rating overlaid. ScrollToTop component in App.js ensures pages start at top on navigation.
